title: Material Planning Policy
description: Material Planning Policy v1 contract for material/packaging group thresholds, procurement suppression, and owner-approved planning buffers.
$comment: Source: docs/documents/0. appendices/05-MATERIAL-PACKAGING-TAXONOMY.md. Thresholds and buffer rates are configuration/owner-policy data and must not be hardcoded.

batch_threshold_count.description: Batch-count threshold from the owner-approved planning policy.

buffer_rate.description: Owner-approved planning buffer rate, represented as a string to avoid hardcoded numeric precision semantics.

suppression_rule.description: Procurement/purchase suppression rule when available stock plus approved incoming quantity meets or exceeds threshold.
